parameters: It'll take a lot of time and energy to head back over land.
We should press on for now.
Saint Bohelos appeared in this land and brought salvation
There's a warm, glowing light. Fully restore the party?
The party's HP and MP has been fully restored!
Before Tolkia was formed, this land belonged to the dragons.
Very few humans would dare to come here.
The first King of Tolkia seized control of the land, sacrificing many
Deep inside the cave lives the master of the cliffs, a dragon
Even the soldiers of Tolkia, well-used to handling dragons,
know to steer clear of that one.
Looking at this country's dragons reminds me of the long-gone
They were our greatest supporters back when the humans defeated
the Demon Lord and drove us out.
They're the reason so many demons survived. They used their big
bodies as shields and their breath attacks to slay our enemies.
When the last one died, it was so sad. They were killed by humans,
but it was us demons who failed to protect them.
